reach_why: Extends known selection-bias and search-space ideas; unlikely wholly unprecedented as an explanatory claim.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links generative curation, pseudo-novelty, nuisance theft, and public silence into one frame.
falsifiable_why: Test by varying pool composition and theft frequency, then checking novelty and confrontation predictions.
explanation: Real innovation depends on hidden candidate curation, not vast combinatorics or visible conflict.
